title: 'Uwriy #0221
definition:
Uri = "fiery"

 1) a prince of Judah, a son of Hur who was used by God to
    prepare the tabernacle
 2) an officer (or the father of an officer) of Solomon in Gilead
 3) a porter or gatekeeper in time of Ezra who took a foreign
    woman as wife
